    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (convergence of research strands in V2G scheduling) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Identifies one prior work (augmented Lagrangian scheduling for electric vehicles) but does not articulate the delta.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (paragraph 4 is out of scope).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (lack of citations).",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (convergence of research strands in V2G scheduling) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Identifies one prior work (augmented Lagrangian scheduling for electric vehicles) but does not articulate the delta.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (paragraph 4 is out of scope).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (lack of citations).
